description: One row per learner per 6E stage per module. Rows are created on entry â€” a row is inserted with in_progress when the learner first opens a stage, and updated to completed when they finish it. Absence of a row means the learner has not reached that stage yet. No pre-created rows, no locked/not_started states.

fields.name: learner_module_progress_id
fields.description: Parent module progress header this stage belongs to

fields.name: learner_id
fields.description: Denormalized for fast direct queries without joining learner_module_progress

fields.name: stage_name
fields.description: Which of the 6E stages this row tracks

fields.name: stage_order
fields.description: Sequence order: 1=engage, 2=explore, 3=explain, 4=express, 5=empower, 6=evolve. Used by application to determine which stage to unlock next â€” when stage_order N is completed, insert stage_order N+1 row as in_progress.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Stage status. in_progress = row inserted when learner first enters this stage. completed = updated when learner finishes. No other states needed â€” absence of a row means not yet reached.

fields.name: started_at
fields.description: When the learner first opened this stage. Set on insert, never null.

fields.name: completed_at
fields.description: When the learner completed this stage. Null while in_progress, set when status moves to completed.

fields.name: time_spent_seconds
fields.description: Total seconds spent in this stage across all sessions. Accumulated on each session end.

indexes.name: idx_lsp_learner_module_progress_id
indexes.description: Fast lookup of all stage rows under a module progress header

indexes.name: idx_lsp_learner_module
indexes.description: Primary lookup: all stages a learner has touched in a module

indexes.name: idx_lsp_learner_module_stage
indexes.description: Enforces one row per learner per module per stage

indexes.name: idx_lsp_stage_status
indexes.description: Stage-level analytics: completion funnel, stuck learners per stage

relationships.description: Each stage row belongs to one module progress header
